step_rationale: Chemokine recruiting monocytes/T cells to atherosclerotic plaque; drivers of plaque destabilization.
mechanism: CXCL16 recruits inflammatory leukocytes to atherosclerotic plaques, amplifying vascular inflammation.

references.title: CXCL16 is a marker of inflammation, atherosclerosis, and acute coronary syndromes in humans.
references.journal: Journal of the American College of Cardiology
